pdchecker 0.9.0

  • Changelog

Set pdchecker Global Options

Source: R/utils.R
set_pdchecker_options.Rd

Set default parameter values for pdchecker functions. Once set, these values are used as defaults across all pdchecker functions, avoiding the need to specify them repeatedly.

Usage

set_pdchecker_options(
  sv_dataset = NULL,
  sv_visit_var = NULL,
  sv_visitnum_var = NULL,
  sv_date_var = NULL,
  ex_datasets = NULL,
  ex_date_var = NULL,
  ex_end_date_var = NULL,
  eot_dataset = NULL,
  eot_date_var = NULL,
  ds_dataset = NULL,
  ds_date_var = NULL,
  ic_dataset = NULL,
  ic_date_var = NULL,
  tb_name_var = NULL,
  test_date_var = NULL,
  test_yn_var = NULL,
  test_result_var = NULL,
  test_cat_var = NULL,
  test_de_var = NULL
)

Arguments

sv_dataset

Character string, visit dataset name (default in functions: "SV")

sv_visit_var

Character string, visit name variable (default in functions: "VISIT")

sv_visitnum_var

Character string, visit number variable (default in functions: "VISITNUM")

sv_date_var

Character string, visit date variable (default in functions: "SVDAT")

ex_datasets

Character vector, exposure dataset names (default in functions: "EX")

ex_date_var

Character vector, dosing start date variable names (default in functions: "EXSTDAT")

ex_end_date_var

Character vector, dosing end date variable names (default in functions: NULL)

eot_dataset

Character string, end of treatment dataset name (default in functions: "EOT")

eot_date_var

Character string, end of treatment date variable (default in functions: "EOTDAT")

ds_dataset

Character string, disposition dataset name (default in functions: "DS")

ds_date_var

Character string, end of study date variable (default in functions: "DSDAT")

ic_dataset

Character string, informed consent dataset name (default in functions: "IC")

ic_date_var

Character string, informed consent date variable (default in functions: "ICDAT")

tb_name_var

Character string, dataset name variable (default in functions: NULL)

test_date_var

Character string, test date variable (default in functions: "LBDAT")

test_yn_var

Character string, test performed variable (default in functions: "YN")

test_result_var

Character string, test result variable (default in functions: "ORRES")

test_cat_var

Character string, test category variable (default in functions: "LBCAT")

test_de_var

Character string, test name variable (default in functions: NULL)

Value

Invisibly returns a named list of the options that were set.

See also

get_pdchecker_options() for viewing current option values

Other options: get_pdchecker_options()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Set common options once at the beginning of your script
set_pdchecker_options(
  sv_dataset = "SV",
  sv_visit_var = "VISIT",
  sv_visitnum_var = "VISITNUM",
  sv_date_var = "SVSTDTC",
  ex_datasets = c("EC"),
  ex_date_var = "ECSTDTC",
  ic_dataset = "IC",
  ic_date_var = "ICDAT"
)

# Now all functions will use these defaults automatically
result <- generate_planned_visit_dates(data = my_data, visitcode = vc)
test_data <- prepare_test_data(data = my_data, test_dataset = "LB")

# You can still override any option in individual function calls
result <- get_first_dose_date(data = my_data, ex_datasets = "EX2")
} # }
